subject: Sound Healing Artist | RAV Vast Meditation Sessions
body:
Dear Mandali team,

I create meditative sound experiences with RAV Vast - a resonant steel instrument with deep therapeutic tones, perfect for silence retreats and meditation practice.

My background:

  • 4-year residency at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore) - sunset meditation sessions
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)

→ RAV Vast Meditation Session

I offer:

  • Sound bath sessions for retreat guests
  • Sunrise/sunset meditation accompaniment
  • RAV Vast introduction workshop

Your focus on silence and spiritual practice is a perfect fit. I'd love to discuss collaboration for 2026.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

subject: Artist Application | Wellbeing Festival July 2026 | Sound Healing
body:
Dear Wellbeing Festival team,

I noticed you featured Nikolaos Unalome for Sound Healing last year. I'd love to contribute to the 2026 edition.

I'm a RAV Vast endorsed artist specializing in sound journeys:

  • 4-year residency creating sunset ceremonies at Lake Maggiore luxury hotel
  • Greece's Got Talent appearance (4 YES votes)
  • Sound healing meets live looping

→ RAV Vast Sound Journey

I can offer:

  • Sound bath sessions at your spa
  • Meditation accompaniment at the UNESCO site
  • Workshop: Introduction to RAV Vast

Being in Greece and speaking the language, I'm available for the full July 3-13 festival window.

In gratitude,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur

body:

subject: Sunset Concert Fusion | RAV Vast + Electronic | 2026
body:
Hi Sunset Hill team,

I discovered your "Sunset Concert Fusion" series - classical/neoclassical/ambient electronic meets sunset. This is EXACTLY my sound!

My format: RAV Vast (steel tongue drum) + live looping + electronic elements. Ambient electronic meets live acoustic.

Background:

  • 4-year sunset session residency at Lake Maggiore luxury hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist
  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes)

→ Sunset Sound - RAV on Melodic House

I'm planning to be in Southeast Asia in 2026 and would love to collaborate with your infinity pool sunset series.

Warm regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Endorsed Artist
linktr.ee/flutur
